# Safe Experiment Prompts

Use these in separate sessions when learning the GitHub Copilot App.

## Read-only context check

```text
This is a controlled GitHub Copilot App automation experiment. Do not edit files, run commands, or create branches. Tell me what project context you can see, what mode you appear to be in, and what you would need before making changes.
```

## Plan-mode behavior check

```text
Plan only. Do not edit files. Create a short plan for adding a README to this empty course repo. Include what files you would inspect first and what you would ask before implementation.
```

## Timeline observation prompt

```text
Do not edit files. Reply with a concise checklist of the app surfaces a learner should observe during this session: conversation timeline, composer, mode selector, model selector, changes view, and session sidebar.
```
